name: Smartvalue Co., Ltd.
summary: Smartvalue Co., Ltd. provides cloud and mobile solutions in Japan. It offers SMART L-Gov, a cloud platform for solving various regional issues; GaaS (Government as a Service), an online administration platform; healthcare support; Mobility IoT, a mobility platform to solve the problems of the mobility society; Kuruma Base, a service that provides a platform for business operators engaged in the service of cars business; and AfterMarket For biz that handles various devices and services installed in vehicles for corporations. The company was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
